titleStmt.title: SII 23.119: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 119. (A.R. No. 119 of 1907.) Āḻvārkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Āvuḍaiyammaṉ temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is engraved in continuation of the above number, but is dated much later. It registers the gift of the village Śeṭṭikuḷam in Kollam 725, Mārgaḻi 10, for the maintenance of the morning and evening worship in the same temple by Rāmappa Nayakkar Ayyaṉ. Evidently the same chief gave again in Kollam 736, Śittirai 10, but on behalf of Viśvanātha Nāyakkar Ayyan (of Madura), the villages (?) Śōlaichchēri, Sambankuḷam, Karumbanpaḷḷam and Ēlēlāsingaṉ for the purpose of repairs to the temple. Another gift of (a land in) the village Tiruppāṇāyakkuḍi for the merit of Chinnappa-Nayakkar-Ayyaṉ is also recorded in continuation at the end, but it is left incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kollam 7 100- I
rupattayyāmāṇṭu mār
kaḻimātam 10 tiyati nayiṉār naraci
ṅkayiccuramuṭaiya nayiṉār
kālacanti pūcaikku Irāma
ppanāyakkar Ayyaṉ viṭṭa
ceṭṭikuḷam perunāṉkel
kaiyāvatu kiḻelkai mañca
ḷoṭaikkum Āṟṟukku me
ṟku teṉelkai Āṉayūrilni
ṉṟum poṟkollap peruva
ḻikkum kallatti kuḷappura
vukkum vaṭakku melelkai tā
ṉṟikkuḷattup puravukkum
marutaṅkuḷattup puravuk
kum kiḻakku vaṭavelkai
kaṭaṉaiāṟṟukkum paṇṇa
ṅkuṭi Aṇaikkum teṟku
Āka Iṉṉāṉkelkaikku U
ḷpaṭṭa kuḷamum puravum karai
kkāṭum paṉaitoppum kā
ṭum Erperppaṭṭa ca
kala cutantiramum Āca
ntiratāravaṟ kaiyyā
ṇṭukoḷḷuvārākavum I
tuvum 7 100 3 10 6 varuṣam cittiraimātam
10 tiyati viccuvaṉātaṉāyakkar A
yyaṉ taṉmamāka tiruppaṇippu
ṟattukku viṭṭa colaiceri cāmpaṉ
kuḷamum karumpaṉ(pa
ṉ)paḷḷam Elelaci
ṅkattukkum peru
ṉāṉkelkaiyā
vatu kiḻelkai ka
mantan Oṭaikku meṟku
m teṉelkai viḷāttikuḷat
tu Ātinārāyaṇappererip
puravukkum kuruntuṭaiyār ku
ḷattup puravukku vaṭakku mele
lkai kuruntuṭaiyār kuḷattu
ppuravukkum maḷikaikāṭu ye
puravukku kiḻakku vaṭavelkai te
vanerippuravukkum kampuoṭai
puravukkum teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ
kelkaiyuḷ kuḷamum puravum karai
kkāṭum karaippaṟṟu—tti
ṇṭāṉa cakala cuyantiramum
Ācantiratāravaṟ kaiyāṇṭu
koḷvārākavum Ituvum
viccuvanāta nāyakkar
ciṉṉappa nāyakkar Ayya
ṉ puṇṇiyamāka
viṭṭa tirupāṇāyakkuṭikku
ṉ kuṟiccikuḷampaṟṟu melStops incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
